jemdoc-cvx – contact

Bug reports, feature requests, and questions belong on the GitHub issue tracker: https://github.com/cvxgrp/jemdoc-cvx/issues.

When filing a bug, please include the output of 

jemdoc --version

so the platform, Python version, and KaTeX availability are clear.
